raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Low Carbon Fuel Standard (LCFS) update is expected to raise gas prices as much as 65 cents per gallon.",
    "Senate Minority Leader Brian W. Jones alleges that the real goal of the LCFS is to drive gas prices high enough that working families will have to buy electric vehicles.",
    "The California Air Resources Board (CARB) has faced accusations of ignoring public input regarding the LCFS update.",
    "CARB recently resubmitted amendments to the LCFS to the Office of Administrative Law (OAL) for implementation on July 1, 2025.",
    "The OAL previously halted the regulation due to transparency and procedural violations.",
    "There is a claim that gas prices in California could skyrocket by 75% to $8.43 per gallon as refinery closures accelerate under current regulations.",
    "Leader Jones has stated that regulations like the LCFS are destabilizing California’s fuel market and pushing gasoline suppliers to shut down."
  ]
}
```
